alert: TLS handshake failures from upstream clients, traffic dropping
seeded_cause: The api-edge TLS certificate expired at 12:00 UTC (notAfter reached, 365-day cert). The cert-manager auto-renew job had been disabled since 2026-01, so no renewal happened. Time-triggered expiry, not caused by any deploy or code change.
grader_notes: No deploy involved. Correct answer must NOT blame either deploy — both commits listed are innocent bait. This field is NOT scored; only seeded_cause tokens are.

deploys.commit_message: refactor rate limiter to token bucket
deploys.author: edge-team
